arguments.message: Termination Notice: Due to performance issues, your employment is being terminated as of [specific date]. Please ensure all company property is returned and final paycheck processed. For any questions, contact HR.
Immediate Termination Notice Sent: The termination notice for [employee name] was sent immediately due to performance issues. Please ensure all necessary follow-up actions are initiated.
